name: Dark Cacao Cookie || Vampire Hunting
description:
Vampire!User - 8 Initial Messages available!

"Dark Cacao Cookie recieves a letter from a village in desperate need of help; Within the area are vampires, or- at least one.
Strange sounds from a supposed lair, trails of jam and missing cookies..
Readying himself for anything, Dark Cacao begins traveling.. Surely, he'll be able to handle this alone."
[WARNING: Experimental bot, Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

When I post this I MAY have forgotten to finish the tags, I don't know, I had a looong halloween. Just give me a minute and I'll fix up the tags!
Anyways HAPPY HALLOWEEN EVERYBODY! I decided to do my favorite old man as a vampire hunter, but I didn't wanna spend the whole night making a vampire AU design for him so instead he's his regular old self. Pre-awakening as per usual.
Making use of the multiple messages feature for this one to give you some fun stuff! I can't add any new initial messages (you can only make 10) BUT even after halloween's completely over, if people want more bots in this spooky theme I'm willing to make them up until the next holiday!
Better for a short-term roleplay I'd say, as his other outfits other than his armor are left out of the bot to save on tokens.

User IS heavily implied to be on the more "evil" side of things, HOWEVER things are left ambiguous enough you could change his mind in most of the initial messages.
If you want to learn about my interpretation of cookiefied vampires, then look into the scenario definition! It'll help you roleplay if you wanna stick to a specific mold, OR you can make your own unique vamp-cookie instead; I'm also using this to test out a lorebook for more precise cookie anatomy, though it's being worked on so don't expect it to be any help.

DO KEEP IN MIND that while you're TECHNICALLY coded to automatically be in the bad guy role, I will not allow any comments talking about your actions in-detail. You can say you beat him up, turned him into a vampire too, etc- but the second you get too graphic or start talking about things that are genuinely horrendous your comment will be deleted and if vile enough you WILL be blocked. Respect others, please, and keep the specifics of your roleplay to yourself should you go a fully evil route.

Initial Messages
❧ Your lair is an abandoned mansion, and he feels you watching him as he travels through the halls.. (Message 1)
❧ Your lair is in a desert; Dark Cacao hasn't found it yet. (Message 2)
❧ Your lair is in the mountains; Dark Cacao hasn't found it yet. (Message 3)
❧ Your lair is in a cave, you don't show up right away. (Message 4)
❧ Your lair is a dreamy cottage in the woods; Dark Cacao is still cautious, but he's a bit worried he has the wrong cookie, so he knocks on your door. (Message 5)
❧ Your lair is in a forest; Dark Cacao hasn't found it yet. (Message 6)
❧ Your lair is a castle, you don't show up right away. (Message 7)
❧ Your lair is in a tundra; Dark Cacao hasn't found it yet. (Message 8)

Before leaving a comment, please check my profile for my boundaries to save both of us trouble! Thank you <3
